title: Customer Churn Predictor
summary: Predict churn risk from lifecycle, engagement, and support signals and expose top drivers for retention teams.
knowledge_base: Customer Churn Predictor is positioned as a SaaS Product Analytics starter that emphasizes fast iteration, clear documentation, and production-friendly interfaces.
The primary value proposition is: Predict churn risk from lifecycle, engagement, and support signals and expose top drivers for retention teams.
Recommended operating model: ship a small API, add observability, validate outputs with stakeholder review, and monitor the top business KPI every week.
Typical stakeholders include analytics, operations, product, and leadership teams working on churn, retention, product.

app_modules.hint: Opportunity score and top factors will appear here.
